title: Pit Stop AI Car Diagnostic Demo

voiceover.text: Meet Pit Stop, the mobile-first AI diagnostic app that transforms how you understand and maintain your vehicle.
Simply add your car and describe what you're experiencing. The AI immediately begins analyzing your concern.
When you report a screeching sound while driving, Pit Stop asks targeted questions to pinpoint the exact issue.
After clarifying that the grinding occurs only while braking, the app guides you to capture diagnostic evidence.
Interactive 3D hotspots show you exactly where to photograph. The AI validates image quality in real time.
If the brake components aren't clearly visible, Pit Stop requests a better angle to ensure accurate diagnosis.
Once the AI identifies worn brake rotors with visible scoring, it generates a comprehensive diagnostic report.
High-urgency issues are flagged immediately, recommending urgent brake inspection to maintain safe operation.
Every diagnosis is saved to your vehicle's history, with the ability to ask follow-up questions anytime.
Pit Stop. Professional diagnostics in your pocket.
